mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT MAPPING_FUNC_NM AS mappingFuncNm ,ARGS_CNT AS argsCnt ,GUIDE_DESC AS guideDesc , @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBMAPPINGFUNCBS WHERE 1=1
AND MAPPING_FUNC_NM like CONCAT('%',#{mappingFuncNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ARGS_CNT like CONCAT('%',#{argsCnt, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND GUIDE_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{guideDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by MAPPING_FUNC_NM ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r where p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) and p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBMAPPINGFUNCBS WHERE 1=1
AND MAPPING_FUNC_NM like CONCAT('%',#{mappingFuncNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ARGS_CNT like CONCAT('%',#{argsCnt, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND GUIDE_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{guideDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
SELECT MAPPING_FUNC_NM AS mappingFuncNm ,ARGS_CNT AS argsCnt ,GUIDE_DESC AS guideDesc FROM TBMAPPINGFUNCBS WHERE MAPPING_FUNC_NM = #{mappingFuncNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBMAPPINGFUNCBS WHERE MAPPING_FUNC_NM = #{mappingFuncNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
